data.title: GTA 6 Fans Analyze Playlists And Combat AI Chaos, One Year After First Trailer
data.description: GTA 6 fans speculate over YouTube playlist updates and fake leaks as Rockstar remains silent a year after the first trailer's release.

data.title: DEA LIVE Hearings On Marijuana Rescheduling, What To Expect
data.description: DEA's marijuana rescheduling hearings could reshape cannabis policy, easing research and tax rules while stopping short of full legalization.

data.title: Big Pharma Pushes To Revise Biden-era Medicare Drug Price Negotiation Law Under Trump
data.description: Pharma companies lobby for changes to Medicare drug price rules, targeting a four-year delay for pills' eligibility. Critics warn it may hinder patient access and innovation.
